content.summary: Navina (navina.ai), legally Navina Technologies, is a New York-based healthcare AI company (HQ: 413 W 14th St #200, New York, NY 10014; R&D in Israel) that delivers an AI-powered clinical intelligence platform for value-based care. Founded by IDF Unit 8200 veterans Ronen Lavi (CEO) and Shay Perera (CTO), the company's Clinician Copilot aggregates EHR, HIE, claims, and ambient data into AI-driven patient summaries, risk adjustment insights, care gap closure tools, and automated documentation — natively embedded in Epic and other EHRs. As of July 2026, Navina has raised $100M in total funding (Series C of $55M closed March 2025, led by Goldman Sachs Alternatives Growth Equity; prior investors include Vertex Ventures Israel, Grove Ventures, ALIVE Israel HealthTech Fund, and Schusterman Family Investments). LinkedIn lists ~281 employees (51–200 band). Key buying signals include aggressive hiring in sales and R&D, expansion into the payer market (backed by former Humana CEO Bruce Broussard joining the advisory board in April 2026), a new enterprise partnership with Summit Health (March 2026), and #1 Best in KLAS 2025 recognition. The platform serves 10,000+ clinicians across 1,300+ clinics supporting 3M+ patients, with an industry-leading 86% weekly active usage rate.
content.industry: Healthcare AI / Digital Health — AI-powered clinical intelligence and value-based care platform
tech_stack: Proprietary clinical NLP/ML AI engine (trained on EHR, imaging notes, consult notes, labs, procedures)
Generative AI – ambient scribe and automated visit note generation (E/M and MEAT documentation)
Epic EHR integration (Best Practice Advisory / BPA, Feb 2024)
Multi-EHR integrations (Epic plus additional EHR systems)
content.headquarters: New York, NY 10014, USA (413 W 14th St #200); R&D office in Israel
key_investors: Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives (Series C lead, March 2025)
buying_signals: Recent major funding: $55M Series C closed March 2025 (Goldman Sachs lead), total $100M raised — actively deploying capital for platform expansion and hiring

Actively hiring across US and Israel: Director of Sales – AI Digital Health, Regional Enterprise Sales Leader, Director of Customer Success, Senior Data Engineer, Senior Full Stack Engineer, Senior Software Architect, FinOps Engineer (as of July 2026)
Market expansion into payer segment: new Summit Health partnership (March 2026); Bruce Broussard (former Humana CEO) joined advisory board (April 2026) to accelerate payer/provider growth

Technology migration / platform scaling: Epic EHR integration launched Feb 2024; expanding ambient scribe and generative AI capabilities; serving 10,000+ clinicians across 1,300+ clinics and 3M+ patients

Industry validation and leadership change: Best in KLAS #1 2025 for Clinician Digital Workflow; back-to-back Gold Stevie Awards (2025, 2026); MedTech Breakthrough Award 2025; CB Insights AI 100 and GenAI 50
Strong platform adoption signal: 86% weekly active usage rate and 81% AI recommendation acceptance rate — high stickiness indicating growing enterprise footprint
Strategic partnerships expanding: agilon health, Privia Health, InnovaCare Health, Millennium Physician Group, Summit Health — indicative of aggressive enterprise sales motion
content.headcount_estimate: ~281 employees (LinkedIn, July 2026); LinkedIn company size band: 51–200
